title: DeathFault [16x]
description: A Black and White Default edit of Minecraft for PvP.
body:
DeathFault [16x] is a texture pack with the purpose of bringing your world and the default Minecraft textures to a black and white themed PvP resource pack. It is a simplistic pack that is fun to use and makes tweaks like shortening the swords blade by a few pixels, which makes it easier to see more of your game on the screen while you PvP.

Here is a showcase Video with skywars gameplay :

[https://youtu.be/Ep54s0wyBxA](https://youtu.be/Ep54s0wyBxA)
